description:

` This was not how he imagined his first encounter with Hank’s relative would go, but then again, nothing ever went as planned with Lieutenant Anderson. `

~ as much as we all love connor he is TOO HARD for me to get a grasp of,,,, i feel like i fail whenever i write him 😭
